creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Initial Review:

 * COMMENT begins with an indefinite article ("A"). Also, make it shorter (see 
   new issue summary/title)
 * GH_PROJECT defaults to ${PORTNAME} already
 * Multiple USE_AUTOTOOLS entries not necessary, separate by space
 * Typo: ACLOCL_ARGS
 * Explain empty assignment: AUTOHEADER_ARGS= ?
 * CONFIGURE_ARGS already contains --prefix (See Mk/bsd.port.mk)

Please also attach:

 * portlint -AC output after addressing any outstanding issues
